title: CCPADataRequest
description: Schema for submitting a CCPA data access or deletion request to RevContent.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the request used for polling status

delete_data.description: 1 to delete user data, 0 to request a data fetch

pub_id.description: Publisher account ID (also accepted as publisher_id)

domain.description: Domain making the request, including protocol (e.g. https://example.com)
